$comment: Machine-checked hardware calibration records. Each entry pairs a cuxray static prediction (recomputed in CI from the recorded disassembly, no GPU needed) against a value measured on real hardware. tests/test_calibration.py replays each and asserts the prediction is within tolerance. To add a record: run the tool in tests/tools/, save the cubin + nvdisasm/cuobjdump outputs under recorded/, and append the measurement here.
